The function `add(String newcode)` does:
Check for Forward Slash Before Appending Space
Check if the new code starts with a forward slash before appending a space. This can be done by adding a simple condition to the if statement that checks if the new code starts with a word character or a backslash.

Use a More Robust Method to Determine if a Space is Needed
Instead of checking if the new code starts with a word character or a backslash, use a more robust method to determine if a space is needed. For example, check if the last character of the existing code is a word character and if the new code starts with a character that requires a space.

Handle Forward Slash as a Special Case
Handle the forward slash as a special case and do not append a space before it. This can be done by adding a separate condition to the if statement that checks if the new code starts with a forward slash.
